chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Time When Eating and Drinking Become Forbidden for the Fasting Person and the Morning Prayer Becomes Permissible

text: 1937 - وَ قَالَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: «وَ هُوَ اَلْفَجْرُ اَلَّذِي لاَ شَكَّ فِيهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1937 - In another narration, Imam (as) said: "It is the dawn about which there is no doubt."
